case_title: MARTA GONZALEZ VS. AURA MARINA SALZAR

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY GONZALEZ, MARTA AS TO DEFENDANT SALZAR, AURA MARINA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-21-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
